specific_mechanism: Voronoi tessellation partitions space into cells around generator points; each cell contains points closer to its generator than any other; the tessellation updates O(log n) on insertion
llm_application: LLM token routing in MoE via Voronoi cells: each expert is a generator and tokens are routed to the nearest expert in representation space; the tessellation re-balances on expert addition.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes computational-geometry spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
